subject: Project pulse: beagle execution in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-9949
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of beagle work in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-9949. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
